title: Ability to communicate with Board members at a Board Level
excerpt: Please give us the ability to communicate with and provide updates to a board members, at the Board Level, not just the item level.

posts.author: rphillipsGEV (Rorry Phillips)
posts.cookedHtml: Please give us the ability to communicate with and provide updates to a board members, at the Board Level, not just the item level.

posts.author: lucina.fox (Lucy Fox)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there any update from Monday.com on this?

posts.author: Southernbks (Tori Breen)
posts.cookedHtml: I think the ability is there now. At the top of the board next to its name, there is a bubble icon with a + sign. Updates can be done there at the board level.

posts.author: lucina.fox (Lucy Fox)
posts.cookedHtml: Can you share a screenshot? I don’t see what you’re referencing!

posts.author: lucina.fox (Lucy Fox)
posts.cookedHtml:
OH JK i see you DID include a screenshot…

I don’t have that function! Any idea how to get it?

posts.author: Southernbks (Tori Breen)
posts.cookedHtml: I am not sure, it just popped up one day… maybe its dependent on which version used?

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
If you reach out to monday support they can possibly bump your account up in the deployment schedule. Its in a staggered roll out that started about a month ago. They are also working on getting it deployed for mobile.

If you watch the Announcements section of the community you will status on new feature releases each month.

posts.author: WeymannServices (David Singer)
posts.cookedHtml:
I saw this feature on the (I think January 2024) what’s new Youtube video.
Yesterday I transitioned from Pro account to Enterprise - and I still don’t see this board-wide bubble, it’s not there. Maybe a Monday pro can advise me?
